title: Accelerating Quantum Computing Research Using AI and Robotics — Chapter 2: AI Today, and Scoping Tomorrow's Frontier
description: Chapter 2 of the QC-Accelerate open dossier. AI is already a co-author of quantum-computing research; this chapter demonstrates AI scoping a hardware frontier — a kept negative on the cat-qubit bias-preserving gate rate tradeoff (kappa1/kappa2), an un-gameable verification instrument, and a map of where AI goes next. No novel physics; every quantitative claim is regenerated by in-repo code. Builds on Chapter 1 (concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20838232).
